dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.BaseGizmoGenerator

Package
Description
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo
 

  • Uses of BaseGizmoGenerator in dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo

    Subclasses of BaseGizmoGenerator in dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    Generates a Gizmo-based CritterEntityModel implementation for a Morphia entity class.
    class 
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    Generates a Gizmo-based PropertyAccessor implementation for a single entity property, delegating to the synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods.
    class 
    PropertyModelGenerator
    Generates a Gizmo-based CritterPropertyModel implementation for a single property of a Morphia entity class.
    class 
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator
    Generates a Gizmo-based PropertyAccessor implementation that uses VarHandle (for fields) or MethodHandle (for getter/setter pairs) to access a single property of a Morphia entity class.
